key_risks: Adverse June employment report surprise increasing volatility in rate-sensitive holdings
Post-holiday reversal in recent sector leaders
FOMC minutes on July 8 introducing unexpected policy signals

portfolio.rationale: Strong 7d return of 4.04% alongside stable PCE and consumer data supporting defensive healthcare positioning into jobs report.
4.57% 7d return with positive labor market trends and low drawdown supporting sector momentum through holiday-shortened week.
1.97% 7d return and 6.88% 30d return with steady ADP employment gains favoring financials ahead of FOMC minutes.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated in healthcare, biotech, and financials to capture recent outperformance and macro stability over the jobs report and holiday window.
rationale_summary: Allocations target sectors with positive trailing returns and resilience to scheduled data releases within the one-week scoring period.
